message:
fix(c_interop): Address security vulnerabilities in subprocess module calls

- High: Add PyModule_Check before casting in isProxyModule() to prevent
  invalid memory access when called on non-module PyObjects

- High: Add isValidPythonIdentifier() to validate module/function names
  and prevent code injection via malicious identifiers

- High: Add escapePythonString() to properly escape quotes, backslashes,
  and control characters in string arguments passed to subprocess

- Medium: Add bounds checking in formatValueForPython() to prevent
  buffer overflows when formatting arrays and strings

- Medium: Add decodePythonEscapes() to properly decode Python escape
  sequences (\n, \t, etc.) in parseSubprocessOutput()

- Increase buffer sizes to accommodate escaped content
